title: cyclosorus rigidus
intro: Cyclosorus rigidus, also known as the Rigid Buckler Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been utilized to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cyclosorus rigidus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat skin conditions, wounds, and other ailments.
